metadata.title: GTA6 Companion - Vice City Interactive Map & Guide
metadata.description: Second-screen companion for GTA6 players: release countdown, Leonida interactive map, character & vehicle database, 22 activity guides. Mobile-first, cross-device sync.
metadata.keywords: GTA6, GTA6 map, GTA6 guide, Vice City, Leonida, GTA6 release date, GTA6 characters, GTA6 activities

home.heroTitle: The second-screen companion for GTA6 players
home.heroSubtitle: An authoritative info hub before launch, the ultimate interactive map and progress tracker after launch. Mobile-first, cross-device sync.

features.mapDesc: Mobile-first interactive map of Leonida with three-state data labeling (confirmed/speculated/leaked) and layer filtering.
features.syncDesc: Progress and markers sync to all devices. Play on TV, check map on phone.
features.seoDesc: Aggregates Rockstar official info and community findings. SEO authority before launch.

cta.subscribeDesc: Get notified on release day and be the first to access the full interactive map.

footer.disclaimer: This is a fan-made unofficial companion tool. GTA and Grand Theft Auto are trademarks of Rockstar Games. This site is not affiliated with Rockstar Games.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: The mission behind GTA6 Companion
about.mission: To build the ultimate second-screen companion for GTA6 players — an authoritative information hub before launch, and the ultimate interactive map and progress tracker after launch.
about.feature1: Aggregate Rockstar official info and community findings with three-state labeling (confirmed/speculated/leaked)
about.feature2: Mobile-first interactive map of Leonida with layer filtering
about.feature3: Characters, vehicles, and activities database, continuously updated
about.feature4: Launch day alerts and Pro feature subscriptions
about.disclaimer: This is a fan-made unofficial companion tool. GTA and Grand Theft Auto are trademarks of Rockstar Games. This site is not affiliated with Rockstar Games. All content is for reference only and not guaranteed to be 100% accurate.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: How we collect, use, and protect your data
privacy.collect: We only collect the email address you voluntarily provide (for launch alert subscriptions). We do not use cookies to track your browsing behavior, nor do we collect personally identifiable information.
privacy.use: Your email is used solely for sending GTA6 launch alerts and product update notifications. We will never send spam, and you can unsubscribe at any time.
privacy.shareTitle: Do We Share with Third Parties
privacy.share: Never. We will not sell, rent, or share your email with any third party. The email service is hosted by Resend and used only for sending emails.
privacy.retain: Your email is retained until you unsubscribe. After unsubscribing, we will remove your email from our mailing list within 30 days.
privacy.rights: You can unsubscribe, view, or delete your data at any time. To do so, contact us via the GitHub repository.
privacy.contact: For privacy-related questions, please open an issue on the GitHub repository th2004xyz/gta6-companion.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.subtitle: Terms for using this site
terms.accept: By accessing or using this site, you agree to these terms of service. If you do not agree, please stop using the site.
terms.service: This site provides unofficial GTA6 information and tools, including an interactive map, character/vehicle database, and launch alerts. The service is provided as-is, with no guarantee of continuous availability or error-free operation.
terms.ip: GTA, Grand Theft Auto, and all related trademarks, characters, and place names are the intellectual property of Rockstar Games. Site content is fan-made and does not claim ownership of any official content.
terms.limitation: This site is an information provider and is not liable for any actions taken based on its content. Game content is subject to Rockstar Games' official releases.
terms.changes: We may update these terms at any time. Continued use of the site constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

items.question: When does GTA6 release?
items.answer: GTA6 launches globally on November 19, 2026, first on PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series X|S. PC version is expected in late 2027.

items.question: Is this an official website?
items.answer: No. This is a fan-made unofficial companion tool. GTA and Grand Theft Auto are trademarks of Rockstar Games. This site is not affiliated with Rockstar Games.

items.question: Is the data on the preview map accurate?
items.answer: Preview map data is based on public information and trailer frame analysis, with strict three-state labeling (confirmed/speculated/leaked). Each marker includes data sources and a confidence score. On release day (Nov 19), data will be quickly corrected and populated with confirmed entries.

items.question: When will the full interactive map launch?
items.answer: The full interactive map launches on release day, November 19, 2026, featuring all collectibles, missions, assets and other markers, with progress tracking and cross-device sync.
